author: aiejvn
name: MDLM v5: EOS Learning + Full Dataset Shard Rotation (Non-Record)
blurb: Builds on PR #1106 MDLM stack. Adds EOS token learning (token 1 as document boundary anchor, never masked) and dedicated PAD_ID=1025 to separate structural padding from diffusion masking. Full FineWeb SP-1024 dataset trained via shard rotation: loads 4 shards at a time, rotates every 6000 steps, ensuring all 80 shards are seen without exceeding RAM. val_var_bpb=0.9901 (128 eval steps), 33M params, 1267 min on 1x AWS A10G.
non_record_reason: Not 8xH100 SXM — trained on 1x AWS A10G
